issue.title: Fix CI/CD so we never publish the same version twice

failed_ci_run.error: crate lino-arguments@0.2.0 already exists on crates.io index

root_causes.summary: publish-crate.mjs used stdio:'inherit' preventing error detection
root_causes.details: execSync with stdio:'inherit' sends stderr to terminal not error.message, so 'already exists' check never matched

root_causes.summary: check-release-needed.mjs only checked git tags not crates.io
root_causes.details: Git tags and registry publication are independent; checking only tags is unreliable

root_causes.summary: Shared 'v' tag prefix for both JS and Rust releases
root_causes.details: Both languages used v{version} tags, creating collision risk
Copy-paste from template; npm version check used wrong package name
